title: [SBW] HeadSound
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/_FKvBxS81oM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

This mod will add the sound of hit the head, from the weapon from the Superb Warfare mod.

The mod must be installed on the server and client, as well as tested on the latest version of the SuperbWarfare mod.


Author Discord: jastickon
